     gets remembered six months from now; the "what" is in the diff. -->

## What

## Why

<!-- The motivation. PRs without "why" get bounced. -->

## Definition of done

- [ ] `go vet ./...` clean
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Touched code is covered by at least one test
- [ ] User-visible change → README updated
- [ ] Design-visible change → CONTEXT.md or SPEC.md updated
- [ ] Smoke-tested against `compose.example.yaml` on real Docker

<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md "Definition of done" for context.
     CONTEXT.md "Anti-patterns to reject in PRs" applies. -->
